overview: A Las Vegas-based longevity clinic led by board-certified neurologist Dr. Charles Kamen, providing physician-supervised personalized protocols including peptide therapy, NAD+ IV therapy, weight management, and regenerative medicine. Treatment is individualized based on comprehensive lab work and medical evaluation.
highlights: Pharmaceutical-grade peptides from licensed USA compounding pharmacies
targetAudience: Patients interested in longevity optimization and proactive health management, particularly those with age-related cognitive decline, metabolic dysfunction, or body composition concerns.
